_description: Add one entry per Figma file. Each file posts design change alerts to its own Slack channel. Comment @mentions trigger DMs to the mentioned person via the bot.

files._figmaFileKey_description_: The file ID from the Figma URL — figma.com/design/THIS_PART/...
files.label: Project Name
files._label_description_: A human-readable name for this project, shown in Slack notifications.
files._watch_description_: The Figma page names to monitor for design changes.
files._slackWebhook_description_: The Slack webhook URL for this team's channel. Paste the URL directly here.

notifications._comments_description_: When true, @mentions in Figma comments trigger a Slack DM to the mentioned person.

slackDmNameOverrides._slackDmNameOverrides_description_: Only needed if someone's name differs between Figma and Slack. Key is their Figma display name, value is their Slack user ID (from their Slack profile). Example: 'Marcus Graham': 'U0ABC123'
